zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Richard Gryffyne於1507年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Griffin31歲，母親Alice Thornborough40歲。他於1535年與Elizabeth Palmer在英國諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1552年在英國被列為solicitor general and attorney general for england and wales。他去世於1569年12月16日在英國諾薩普頓史爾丁格利享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Richard Gryffyne于1507年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Griffin31岁，母亲Alice Thornborough40岁。他于1535年与Elizabeth Palmer在英国諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1552年在英国被列为solicitor general and attorney general for england and wales。他去世于1569年12月16日在英国諾薩普頓史爾丁格利享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Richard Gryffyne was born in 1507, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Griffin, was 31 and his mother, Alice Thornborough, was 40. He married Elizabeth Palmer in 1535, in Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. In 1552, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as solicitor general and attorney general for england and wales in England. He died on 16 December 1569, in Dingley, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.Stanford in the Vale, Berkshire, England: Stanford in the Vale, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Richard Gryffyne est né en 1507, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Griffin, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Thornborough, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Palmer en 1535, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. En 1552, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est solicitor general and attorney general for england and wales à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 16 décembre 1569, à Dingley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.Stanford in the Vale, Berkshire, England: Stanford in the Vale, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Richard Gryffyne 1507 in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Griffin 31 und seine Mutter Alice Thornborough 40. Er hat 1535 in Northamptonshire, England Elizabeth Palmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. 1552, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als solicitor general and attorney general for england and wales in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. Dezember 1569 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Dingley, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Richard Gryffyne è nato il nel 1507 nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Griffin, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Alice Thornborough, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Palmer nel 1535, nel Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Nel 1552, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come solicitor general and attorney general for england and wales nel England. Morì il 16 dicembre 1569, nel Dingley, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Richard Gryffyneが1507年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Griffinは31歳，母Alice Thornboroughは40歳であった。1535年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでElizabeth Palmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1552年，45歳の時，イギリスでの職業はsolicitor general and attorney general for england and walesと記録されている。彼は1569年12月16日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアディングリーで62歳で死去した。

ko.Stanford in the Vale, Berkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 스탠퍼드 인 테 발
ko.lifeSummary: Edward Richard Gryffyne(이)가 1507년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Griffin(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Thornborough(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1535년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 Elizabeth Palmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1552년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 solicitor general and attorney general for england and wales이었다. 그는 1569년 12월 16일 영국 노르섬프토실르 딩글리에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Richard Gryffyne nasceu em 1507, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Griffin, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Thornborough, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Palmer em 1535, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Em 1552, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como solicitor general and attorney general for england and wales em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1569, em Dingley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.Stanford in the Vale, Berkshire, England: станфорд ин т веил, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Richard Gryffyne родился в 1507 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Griffin было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Thornborough, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Palmer в 1535 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. В 1552 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии solicitor general and attorney general for england and wales в местности Англия. Он умер 16 декабря 1569 г. в местности дингли, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.Stanford in the Vale, Berkshire, England: Stanford in the Vale, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Richard Gryffyne nació en 1507, en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Griffin, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Thornborough, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Palmer en 1535, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. En 1552, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era solicitor general and attorney general for england and wales en Inglaterra. Murió el 16 de diciembre de 1569, en Dingley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
